changelog: The Open Store Settings screen no longer repeats `Current installed` version text in multiple places. Build date and time in the Open Store version summary now read correctly from the latest README format, including combined lines like `Build Date and Time(UST) ...`. Large app downloads now recover even when the uploaded `.apk.asset.json` file is missing the final GitHub Release asset URL. Open Store can resolve the correct release asset path more reliably, and future admin uploads preserve those URLs instead of overwriting them.
